feed.title: The Git Times
feed.subtitle: AI-generated newspaper for builders — daily coverage of trending GitHub projects

entry.title: Perry v0.5.178 Stabilizes Native TypeScript Pipeline
entry.summary: “The major problems of the world are the result of the difference between how nature works and the way people think.” — Gregory Bateson

entry.title: Native C++ Finance Terminal Brings Bloomberg Power to Developers
entry.summary: “The purpose of a system is what it does.” — Stafford Beer

entry.title: Kami Imposes Editorial Discipline on AI Documents
entry.summary: “Technology is not a neutral tool. It is a system that carries its own values.” — Ursula Franklin

entry.title: OpenMythos Reconstructs Claude Mythos Architecture
entry.summary: “Tools for conviviality are those which give each person who uses them the greatest opportunity to enrich the environment with the fruits of their vision.” — Ivan Illich

entry.title: Evolver Engine Brings Genetic Protocols to AI Self-Evolution
entry.summary: “Everywhere we remain unfree and chained to technology, whether we passionately affirm or deny it.” — Martin Heidegger

entry.title: Oh-My-ClaudeCode v4.12 Adds Per-Role Model Routing for Teams
entry.summary: “Whether a technology is liberating or enslaving depends on who controls it.” — Ursula Franklin

entry.title: Antigravity Skills Add Gift Workflow and Test Automation
entry.summary: “The real problem is not whether machines think but whether men do.” — B.F. Skinner

entry.title: Hermes WebUI Extends Persistent Agent to Browser
entry.summary: “Technology is the knack of so arranging the world that we don't have to experience it.” — Max Frisch

entry.title: Mastra Release Strengthens Observability for TypeScript AI Apps
entry.summary: “The question concerning technology is never merely technical.” — Martin Heidegger

entry.title: Developers Whip Claude AI Into Faster Code Generation
entry.summary: “You never change things by fighting the existing reality. To change something, build a new model that makes the existing model obsolete.” — Buckminster Fuller

entry.title: Rust Rewrite Delivers Efficient Web Data Fetching for AI Agents
entry.summary: “The major problems of the world are the result of the difference between how nature works and the way people think.” — Gregory Bateson

entry.title: Caveman Syntax Slashes LLM Token Usage While Preserving Accuracy
entry.summary: “It has become appallingly obvious that our technology has exceeded our humanity.” — Albert Einstein

entry.title: Apfel Brings Apple's On-Device LLM to the Command Line
entry.summary: “The best way to predict the future is to invent it.” — Alan Kay

entry.title: oh-my-openagent v3.14 Refines Multi-Model Agent Harness
entry.summary: “We are what we behold. We shape our tools and then our tools shape us.” — John Culkin

entry.title: DeerFlow 2.0 Rewrites the Playbook for Long-Horizon AI Agents
entry.summary: “Tools for conviviality are those which give each person who uses them the greatest opportunity to enrich the environment with the fruits of their vision.” — Ivan Illich

entry.title: GoClaw Delivers Secure Multi-Tenant AI Agent Platform
entry.summary: “New technology is not additive; it is ecological. A new medium does not add something; it changes everything.” — Neil Postman

entry.title: colleague-skill
entry.summary: “For a successful technology, reality must take precedence over public relations, for nature cannot be fooled.” — Richard Feynman

entry.title: Codex Plugin Brings OpenAI Reviews to Claude Code
entry.summary: “The medium is the message.” — Marshall McLuhan

entry.title: Lightweight CLI Proxy Slashes LLM Token Costs for Developers
entry.summary: “Technology is not a neutral tool. It is a system that carries its own values.” — Ursula Franklin

entry.title: CC Switch Integrates GitHub Copilot in Major Desktop Update
entry.summary: “Progress imposes not only new possibilities for the future but new restrictions.” — Norbert Wiener
